name: Client Operating Model Phase 8 Sandbox Drift
outcome_goal: Produce the live sandbox promotion and drift feedback implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not allow live sandbox promotion without passed simulation verification.

jobs.label: phase_08_sandbox_drift_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_08_sandbox_drift/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 8: Live Sandbox Promotion and Drift Feedback. Cover promotion candidates, sandbox execution, readback, predicted-vs-actual comparison, drift reason codes, updates to contracts/gaps/bugs, tests, validation, and stop boundaries. Do not edit code.
